sourcePrompt.releaseContext: cleanup/dev-visibility work after Stage 3 group 1 keeper
userRisks: new between-level waits may be intentional for audio conformance or may be a regression against original game flow
challenging stages should retain probabilistic perfect-score opportunity, especially for professional persona
all challenge targets should fully enter the screen at some time
late-stage alien progression may be too fast or unlike the original

probes.label: Regular stage 1 to stage 2
probes.read: spawn committed through stage-flow transition path

probes.label: Regular stage 4 to stage 5
probes.read: spawn committed through stage-flow transition path

probes.label: Challenge entry stage 2 to stage 3
probes.read: spawn committed through stage-flow transition path

challengeResult.label: Challenge result stage 3 to stage 4
challengeResult.read: result banner hold plus challengeResult transition committed to next regular stage

transitionCadence.read: Transition timing is split by normal handoff, challenge entry, and challenge result. Challenge-result clear-to-spawn includes both the result banner hold and the next-stage transition window.

proxyDefinition.sprite: enemy family/type base dimensions centered at x/y
proxyDefinition.scoreWindow: runtime challenge hitbox-scale dimensions centered at x/y

summary.read: This is a deterministic one-seed-per-persona/stage probe against the provided success trajectory, not a probabilistic proof.

verdict.recommendation: Treat this as measurement-backed cleanup input. Do not tune yet; next compare affected waits and challenge paths against archived reference clips before choosing the smallest runtime change.
